_meta.description: Forensic Red-Flag scan per holding. Follows the dashboard Red Flags prompt: 4 categories scored /10 where 10 = clean (no concerns) and 0-3 = serious/multiple red flags. Overall = weighted average (Accounting 30%, Governance 30%, Financial 20%, Business 20%). Grounded in reported financials (OCF vs profit, receivables, debt/EBITDA, FCF, dilution), curated governance/risk flags, and public filings. NOT investment advice.
_meta.score_meaning: Higher = cleaner / fewer red flags. Lower = more or more-severe red flags.

accounting.reason: Profit converts well to operating cash; healthy margins.

governance.reason: Reputable founder-led board (Dr Devi Shetty); clean disclosures.

financial.reason: Low debt, strong free cash flow.

business.reason: Overseas (Cayman) operations add some complexity; bed concentration.

NH.summary: Clean forensic profile: strong cash conversion, low debt and reputable governance; only minor complexity from overseas operations.
NH.sources: Dashboard financials (OCF/PAT, debt, FCF, dilution) + curated risk flags + public filings (BSE/NSE/screener.in), analyst knowledge
